creator: laurent@daverio.net
text:
(In reply to Matthias Fechner from comment #2)

Hi Matthias, thank you for your reply :)

That's very weird because, as far as I know, I have never tweaked my build configuration.

I don't know how to install poudriere, I'm not sure that I can. But I will definitely try to build the module on other machines, and see if I can find something.
